mobile_theft.title: Mobile Phone Theft or Snatching
mobile_theft.template: I am reporting the theft/snatching of my mobile phone ({brand_model}) that occurred on {date} at {time} near {location}. IMEI number: {imei}. I request you to block the device and register an FIR/LDR.

loss_identity_docs.title: Loss of Identity Documents
loss_identity_docs.template: I am writing to report the loss of my {document_type} (Aadhar/PAN/Voter ID) which went missing on {date} near {location}. I request a lost article report to apply for a duplicate.

residential_burglary.title: Residential Burglary Complaint
residential_burglary.template: I wish to report a house-breaking incident at my residence {address} which occurred between {start_time} and {end_time} on {date}. Valuable items including {items} are missing. Requesting immediate investigation.

vehicle_theft.title: Motor Vehicle Theft
vehicle_theft.template: My vehicle ({vehicle_type}), Registration No: {reg_no}, was stolen from {location} on {date} at approximately {time}. I request the registration of an FIR for insurance and recovery purposes.

pickpocketing.title: Pickpocketing in Public Transport
pickpocketing.template: I am reporting a pickpocketing incident that occurred on {date} while traveling in {transport_details} at {location}. My {item_stolen} was stolen from my pocket/bag. Requesting investigation.

chain_snatching.title: Chain Snatching Complaint
chain_snatching.template: I was a victim of chain snatching on {date} at {time} near {location}. The item was a {description_of_jewelry}. The accused fled on a {vehicle_description}. Requesting immediate action.

atm_skimming.title: ATM Card Skimming/Cloning
atm_skimming.template: I am reporting unauthorized withdrawals from my bank account via ATM skimming. An amount of ₹{amount} was debited on {date} without my card leaving my possession. Requesting investigation and CCTV footage review.

bank_withdrawal_phishing.title: Fraudulent Bank Withdrawal via Phishing
bank_withdrawal_phishing.template: An amount of ₹{amount} was fraudulently transferred from my bank account on {date} after I clicked a suspicious link/received a call. I request immediate investigation and a freeze on the recipient's account.

credit_card_fraud.title: Credit Card Fraud
credit_card_fraud.template: Unauthorized transactions totaling ₹{amount} were made on my credit card {card_number} on {date}. I have blocked the card and request an investigation into these unauthorized charges.

ecommerce_scam.title: E-commerce Fraud Complaint
ecommerce_scam.template: I have been defrauded by an online seller on {website_app}. I paid ₹{amount} for {product} on {date}, but the item was never delivered and the seller is unreachable. Requesting action against the fraudulent entity.

lost_wallet.title: Lost Wallet Report
lost_wallet.template: I am reporting the loss of my wallet on {date} at {location}. It contained ₹{cash_amount} and cards including {card_details}. Requesting an official report for document re-issuance.

theft_electricity.title: Theft of Electricity (Hooking)
theft_electricity.template: I wish to report illegal electricity hooking/theft occurring at {location}. This is causing a safety hazard and loss to the department. Requesting an inspection and legal action.

theft_water.title: Theft of Water (Illegal Connection)
theft_water.template: Reporting illegal water motor connections and theft of water at {location}. This is affecting the legitimate supply in the area. Requesting immediate disconnection and action.

shop_lifting.title: Shop-lifting or Inventory Theft
shop_lifting.template: I am reporting a theft of inventory/shop-lifting incident at {shop_name} on {date}. The stolen items include {items_list}. CCTV footage of the suspect is available for investigation.

fake_currency.title: Fake Currency Circulation
fake_currency.template: I have come into possession of counterfeit currency notes of denomination {denomination} at {location} on {date}. I am surrendering the notes and request investigation into the source.

cheque_bounce.title: Cheque Bounce Case
cheque_bounce.template: I am filing a complaint regarding a cheque bounce (Cheque No: {cheque_no}) for the amount of ₹{amount} issued by {issuer_name}. The cheque was returned due to {reason}. Requesting legal proceedings.

property_doc_forgery.title: Property Document Forgery
property_doc_forgery.template: I am reporting the forgery of property documents related to {property_details}. Unauthorized persons have created fake deeds to claim ownership. Requesting forensic verification and FIR.

land_grabbing.title: Land Grabbing or Illegal Encroachment
land_grabbing.template: My property at {address} has been illegally encroached upon/grabbed by {name/group} on {date}. I request immediate removal of the encroachment and police protection.

chit_fund_fraud.title: Fraud by Chit Fund Company
chit_fund_fraud.template: I have been defrauded by {company_name} in a chit fund scheme. I invested ₹{total_investment}, but the company has closed its office and the directors are absconding. Requesting recovery and arrest.

online_job_scam.title: Online Job Scam
online_job_scam.template: I was defrauded of ₹{amount} by a fake recruitment agency {agency_name} promising a work-from-home job on {date}. They are now unreachable. Requesting investigation into the bank account provided.

lottery_scam.title: Lottery Scam (SMS/WhatsApp)
lottery_scam.template: I received a fraudulent message claiming I won a lottery/prize from {name}. I was tricked into paying ₹{processing_fee} as 'processing fees'. Requesting action against the numbers {phone_numbers}.

construction_material_theft.title: Theft of Construction Materials
construction_material_theft.template: Theft of construction materials including {materials} occurred at my site {location} on the night of {date}. Requesting investigation and recovery.

missing_livestock.title: Missing Livestock (Cattle/Poultry)
missing_livestock.template: I am reporting that my {animal_type} (Count: {number}) has been missing/stolen from {location} since {date}. Any information or assistance in recovery is requested.

bicycle_theft.title: Bicycle Theft
bicycle_theft.template: My bicycle ({brand/color}) was stolen from the public stand at {location} on {date} between {time_range}. Requesting search and check of local scrap shops.

laptop_gadget_theft.title: Laptop or Electronic Gadget Theft
laptop_gadget_theft.template: My {gadget_type} ({brand/serial_no}) was stolen from {office_cafe_location} on {date} at {time}. I request an FIR to block the device and check CCTV footage.

insurance_fraud.title: Insurance Fraud (Fake Claims)
insurance_fraud.template: I am reporting a suspected fake insurance claim made by {name} regarding {policy_details}. The claim is based on fabricated evidence of {incident}. Requesting verification.

extortion_threats.title: Extortion Threats (Vasooli)
extortion_threats.template: I am receiving extortion threats from {name/group} demanding ₹{amount} at {location/phone}. They have threatened me with {consequences}. I request immediate protection and arrest.

illegal_subletting.title: Illegal Subletting of Property
illegal_subletting.template: My tenant at {address} has illegally subletted the property to unauthorized persons without my consent. Requesting intervention to clear the premises as per the rental agreement.

railway_baggage_theft.title: Theft of Personal Baggage at Railway Station
railway_baggage_theft.template: My baggage containing {items} was stolen at {station_name} / on Train No {train_no} on {date}. Requesting GRP assistance and CCTV check.

unauthorized_digital_signature.title: Unauthorized Use of Digital Signature
unauthorized_digital_signature.template: I am reporting the unauthorized use of my Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) on {date} for {transaction/document}. This was not authorized by me. Requesting investigation into the IP address used.

crypto_fraud.title: Cryptocurrency Investment Fraud
crypto_fraud.template: I have been defrauded of {amount_crypto} (equivalent to ₹{amount_inr}) by a fake investment platform {platform_name}. I request the cyber cell to track the wallet address {wallet_address}.

old_coin_scam.title: Old Coin or Stamp Sale Scam
old_coin_scam.template: I was cheated of ₹{amount} by an individual on {platform} who promised to facilitate the sale of old coins/stamps. The suspect is now demanding 'RBI clearance fees'. Requesting action.

travel_agent_fraud.title: Fraud by Travel Agent (Fake Visa/Ticket)
travel_agent_fraud.template: The travel agent {agent_name} has provided me with a fake visa/ticket for {destination} and charged me ₹{amount}. I am now stranded and the agent is unreachable. Requesting FIR.

partnership_fund_misappropriation.title: Misappropriation of Partnership Funds
partnership_fund_misappropriation.template: My business partner {partner_name} has misappropriated funds to the tune of ₹{amount} from our firm {firm_name} without authorization. Requesting an audit and legal action.

solar_panel_theft.title: Theft of Solar Panels or Batteries
solar_panel_theft.template: Theft of solar panels and street batteries occurred at {location} on {date}. These are public/private assets worth ₹{amount}. Requesting investigation.

social_media_hacking.title: Social Media Account Hacking
social_media_hacking.template: My {platform} account (@{username}) has been hacked and accessed unauthorizedly on {date}. The hacker has changed my recovery details. I request assistance in securing the account and investigating the breach.

unauthorized_email_access.title: Unauthorized Email Access
unauthorized_email_access.template: My email account {email_address} was accessed unauthorizedly from IP {ip_if_known} on {date}. Sensitive data may have been compromised. Requesting forensic investigation.

cyberstalking.title: Cyberstalking/Online Harassment
cyberstalking.template: I am being repeatedly harassed and stalked online by {username/id} on {platform}. I have received unwanted messages and threats since {date}. I request immediate intervention and protection.

cyberbullying.title: Cyberbullying or Online Harassment
cyberbullying.template: I am reporting an instance of cyberbullying on {platform} where {user_id} is posting derogatory and harmful content about me. Requesting the removal of content and action against the user.

fake_profile_creation.title: Creation of Fake Profile
fake_profile_creation.template: A fake profile using my name and photographs has been created on {platform} (URL: {profile_url}). This profile is being used to malign my reputation. Requesting its immediate takedown.

identity_theft_loans.title: Identity Theft for Loans
identity_theft_loans.template: I discovered that someone has used my personal information (Aadhar/PAN) to obtain unauthorized loans from {app/bank_name}. I did not apply for these. Requesting investigation into identity theft.

revenge_porn.title: Revenge Porn (Private Image Sharing)
revenge_porn.template: Private and sensitive images/videos of me are being circulated without my consent on {platform} by {name_if_known}. I request immediate removal under IT Act and arrest of the perpetrator.

whatsapp_defamation.title: Defamation via Social Media/WhatsApp
whatsapp_defamation.template: Derogatory and false information about me is being circulated in WhatsApp groups/social media by {name/number}. This is causing severe damage to my reputation. Requesting legal action.

sextortion.title: Sextortion Blackmail Complaint
sextortion.template: I am being blackmailed by an individual using private images/video calls on {platform}. They are demanding ₹{amount}. I request immediate cyber-cell intervention to stop the harassment.

ransomware_attack.title: Malware/Ransomware Attack
ransomware_attack.template: My business computer systems at {location} have been locked by ransomware. The attackers are demanding {amount} in Bitcoin. Requesting assistance from the cyber forensics team.

data_breach.title: Data Breach of Company Code/Data
data_breach.template: I am reporting a data breach at {company_name} where proprietary source code and client data were stolen on {date}. Requesting investigation into the source of the leak.

domain_hijacking.title: Domain Hijacking
domain_hijacking.template: My website domain {domain_url} was unauthorizedly transferred to another registrar on {date}. This has disrupted my business operations. Requesting recovery assistance.

govt_phishing.title: Phishing Masquerading as Govt Official
govt_phishing.template: I received an email/SMS from {sender} pretending to be from {government_department} asking for sensitive details. This appears to be a phishing attempt. Requesting investigation.

upi_fraud.title: UPI Fraud Complaint
upi_fraud.template: I was tricked into a fraudulent UPI transaction of ₹{amount} on {date} via a {collect_request/QR_scan}. The transaction ID is {txn_id}. Requesting a reversal and investigation of the recipient's account.

sim_swap_fraud.title: SIM Swap Fraud
sim_swap_fraud.template: My SIM card was deactivated without my request on {date}, and unauthorized bank transactions occurred shortly after. This appears to be a SIM swap fraud. Requesting investigation.

cctv_hacking.title: Unauthorized CCTV Hacking
cctv_hacking.template: My private CCTV cameras at {location} have been hacked and the feed is being accessed by unauthorized persons. Requesting a security audit and investigation.

online_gaming_fraud.title: Online Gaming Fraud
online_gaming_fraud.template: My virtual assets worth ₹{amount} in the game {game_name} were stolen through a phishing link on {date}. Requesting investigation into the user {id}.

copyright_infringement.title: Copyright Infringement (Piracy)
copyright_infringement.template: My copyrighted work {work_title} is being distributed illegally on {website_url} without my permission. I request a takedown and action against the site owner.

csam_distribution.title: Distribution of CSAM
csam_distribution.template: I am reporting the distribution of child sexual abuse material on the platform {platform} at URL {url}. This is a serious crime requiring immediate action.

wifi_hacking.title: Wi-fi Hacking / Bandwidth Theft
wifi_hacking.template: My private Wi-fi network at {location} is being hacked and used by unauthorized persons for suspicious activities. Requesting investigation.

vishing_bank_impersonation.title: Impersonating Bank Official (Vishing)
vishing_bank_impersonation.template: I received a call from {phone_number} where the caller impersonated a bank official from {bank_name} to extract my OTP. Requesting to block this number and investigate.

kyc_update_fraud.title: KYC Update Fraud
kyc_update_fraud.template: I was defrauded of ₹{amount} on {date} by a person claiming to update my KYC for {bank/wallet}. They used a remote access app to steal funds. Requesting investigation.

olx_qr_scam.title: OLX/Marketplace QR Code Scam
olx_qr_scam.template: While trying to sell an item on OLX, the buyer {name} sent me a QR code claiming it was to 'receive' money, but it debited ₹{amount} from my account. Requesting action.

remote_access_fraud.title: Remote Access Fraud (AnyDesk/TeamViewer)
remote_access_fraud.template: I was tricked into installing {app_name} by a caller claiming to be from {company}. They took control of my phone and transferred ₹{amount}. Requesting immediate investigation.

dating_app_scam.title: Dating App Scam (Catfishing)
dating_app_scam.template: I was defrauded of ₹{amount} by a person I met on {dating_app}. They used a fake identity and fabricated an emergency to borrow money. Requesting investigation into the account {account_details}.

physical_assault.title: Physical Assault Complaint
physical_assault.template: I was physically assaulted by {name/description} on {date} at {time} at {location}. I have sustained injuries and request medical examination and legal action under the relevant sections of the law.

grievous_hurt.title: Grievous Hurt (Serious Injury)
grievous_hurt.template: I am reporting an incident of grievous hurt where {name} caused {fracture/serious_injury} to me on {date} at {location}. Requesting immediate arrest and investigation.

domestic_violence.title: Domestic Violence Complaint (498A)
domestic_violence.template: I am filing a complaint regarding domestic violence and cruelty by my husband and his relatives at {address}. The incidents occurred on {date}. I request police protection and action.

workplace_sexual_harassment.title: Sexual Harassment at Workplace
workplace_sexual_harassment.template: I am filing a complaint of sexual harassment against {person_name} at my workplace {office_name}. The incident occurred on {date}. Requesting investigation by the ICC and police.

eve_teasing.title: Eve-teasing or Molestation
eve_teasing.template: I was subjected to eve-teasing/molestation by {description} at {location} on {date} at {time}. Requesting increased patrolling and investigation.

physical_stalking.title: Stalking (Physical)
physical_stalking.template: I am being physically followed and stalked by {description/name} near my {home/office} since {date}. This is causing me great distress and fear. Requesting intervention.

phone_threats.title: Threatening over the Phone
phone_threats.template: I am receiving life-threatening calls from {phone_number} since {date}. The caller is using abusive language and threatening me with {details}. Requesting protection.

abusive_language_public.title: Use of Abusive Language in Public
abusive_language_public.template: I was publicly insulted and abused by {name} at {location} on {date}. This was done in the presence of witnesses {witness_names}. Requesting action for public mischief.

wrongful_restraint.title: Wrongful Restraint
wrongful_restraint.template: I was wrongfully restrained and prevented from proceeding in a direction I had a right to go by {name} at {location} on {date}. Requesting legal action.

kidnapping_ransom.title: Kidnapping for Ransom
kidnapping_ransom.template: I am reporting the kidnapping of {person_name} from {location} on {date}. We have received a ransom call demanding ₹{amount}. Requesting immediate rescue operation.

missing_person.title: Missing Person Report (Adult)
missing_person.template: I am reporting that {person_name}, aged {age}, has been missing from {location} since {date} {time}. They were last seen wearing {clothes}. I request an immediate search.

missing_child.title: Missing Child Report
missing_child.template: My child {name}, aged {age}, has gone missing from {location} on {date} at {time}. Requesting immediate 'Track Child' alert and search operation.

elderly_abandonment.title: Abandonment of Elderly Parents
elderly_abandonment.template: I wish to report the abandonment of {parent_names} by their children at {location}. They are in need of care and maintenance. Requesting action under Maintenance of Parents Act.

caste_discrimination.title: Caste-based Discrimination (SC/ST Act)
caste_discrimination.template: I was subjected to caste-based insults and discrimination by {name} at {location} on {date}. Requesting the registration of an FIR under the SC/ST Prevention of Atrocities Act.

criminal_intimidation.title: Criminal Intimidation
criminal_intimidation.template: I am being criminally intimidated by {name} who is threatening to cause injury to my person/reputation/property if I do not {action}. Requesting protection.

attempt_to_murder.title: Attempt to Murder
attempt_to_murder.template: An attempt was made on my life by {name} using {weapon} at {location} on {date}. I survived but request immediate arrest of the accused for attempt to murder.

dowry_harassment.title: Dowry Harassment
dowry_harassment.template: I am being harassed and tortured for dowry by my in-laws at {address}. They are demanding ₹{amount} and {items}. Requesting immediate legal intervention.

cruelty_by_relatives.title: Cruelty by Spouse or Relatives
cruelty_by_relatives.template: I am reporting systematic mental and physical cruelty by {names} at {address} since {date}. Requesting investigation and protection.

voyeurism.title: Voyeurism (Hidden Cameras)
voyeurism.template: I discovered a hidden camera in the {changing_room/trial_room/washroom} at {location} on {date}. This is a gross violation of privacy. Requesting seizure of the device and arrest.

acid_attack_threats.title: Acid Attack Threats
acid_attack_threats.template: I am receiving specific threats of an acid attack from {name/description} since {date}. I request immediate security and preventive action against the suspect.

illegal_detention.title: Illegal Detention / Confinement
illegal_detention.template: I/My relative {name} is being illegally detained and confined against their will at {location} by {names}. Requesting immediate rescue.

human_trafficking.title: Human Trafficking Complaint
human_trafficking.template: I have information regarding a human trafficking ring operating from {location} where people are being held for {purpose}. Requesting a raid and rescue operation.

forced_labor.title: Forced Labor or Bonded Labor
forced_labor.template: I am reporting the practice of forced/bonded labor at {location} where workers are being held against their will and denied wages. Requesting intervention.

child_labor.title: Child Labor Complaint
child_labor.template: I wish to report the employment of children at {business_name/location}. This is a violation of the Child Labor Act. I request the authorities to conduct a rescue operation.

medical_negligence.title: Medical Negligence Complaint
medical_negligence.template: I am filing a complaint against {doctor_hospital} for gross medical negligence during the treatment of {patient_name} on {date}, resulting in {consequence}. Requesting medical board review.

bigamy.title: Bigamy Complaint
bigamy.template: I am reporting that my spouse {name} has entered into a second marriage with {person} on {date} while our marriage is still legally subsisting. Requesting legal action.

obscene_acts_public.title: Obscene Acts in Public
obscene_acts_public.template: I am reporting obscene acts and gestures being performed in public by {description} at {location} on {date}. This is causing public annoyance.

communal_hatred.title: Incitement of Communal Hatred
communal_hatred.template: I am reporting a speech/social media post by {name} that is inciting communal hatred and disharmony among communities on {date}. Requesting preventive action.

newborn_abandonment.title: Abandonment of Newborn Infant
newborn_abandonment.template: An abandoned newborn infant was found at {location} on {date} at {time}. Requesting immediate medical care for the infant and investigation into the parents.

restraining_order_violation.title: Violation of Restraining Order
restraining_order_violation.template: The individual {name} has violated the restraining order issued by {court} on {date} by attempting to contact/approach me at {location}. Requesting arrest for contempt.

noise_pollution.title: Noise Pollution (Loudspeakers)
noise_pollution.template: I am complaining about illegal use of loudspeakers/construction noise at {location} occurring on {date} after 10 PM. This is a violation of noise pollution norms.

illegal_parking.title: Illegal Parking Blocking Entrance
illegal_parking.template: A vehicle with Reg No {reg_no} is parked illegally blocking the entrance of {address} since {time}. It is causing a major obstruction. Requesting towing.

public_intoxication.title: Public Drinking / Intoxication Nuisance
public_intoxication.template: I am reporting a group of individuals drinking in public and causing a nuisance at {location} on {date} evening. This is making the area unsafe for residents.

public_gambling.title: Gambling in Public Places
public_gambling.template: Illegal gambling activities are taking place in public view at {location} on {date}. Requesting a raid and action under the Public Gambling Act.

drug_peddling.title: Drug Peddling in Locality
drug_peddling.template: I wish to provide information regarding suspected drug peddling activities occurring near {landmark/location} routinely at {time}. Requesting patrolling.

bootlegging.title: Illegal Liquor Sales (Bootlegging)
bootlegging.template: Illegal sale of liquor is occurring at {location} without a license. This is attracting anti-social elements to the neighborhood. Requesting action.

rash_driving.title: Rash and Negligent Driving
rash_driving.template: I am reporting a vehicle {reg_no} for extremely rash and negligent driving at {location} on {date}. It nearly caused multiple accidents. Requesting a fine/challan.

hit_and_run.title: Hit and Run Accident
hit_and_run.template: A hit and run accident occurred at {location} on {date} where a vehicle ({description}) hit {victim} and fled. Requesting CCTV review to identify the vehicle.

footpath_encroachment.title: Encroachment of Public Footpath
footpath_encroachment.template: The public footpath at {location} has been encroached upon by {vendors/shops}, making it impossible for pedestrians to walk. Requesting an eviction drive.

garbage_dumping.title: Illegal Dumping of Garbage/Debris
garbage_dumping.template: Construction debris and garbage are being illegally dumped at {location} on {date}. This is causing a health hazard. Requesting a penalty on the violator.

animal_cruelty.title: Animal Cruelty Complaint
animal_cruelty.template: I am reporting an instance of severe animal cruelty at {location} where {name} was seen beating/starving {animal}. Requesting action under the PCA Act.

stray_cattle_nuisance.title: Nuisance Caused by Stray Cattle
stray_cattle_nuisance.template: Stray cattle are causing major traffic hazards and safety issues at {location}. Requesting the municipal authorities to relocate them to a shelter.

dangerous_pets.title: Dangerous Pets / Dog Bite Case
dangerous_pets.template: My {relative/self} was bitten by a pet dog belonging to {owner_name} at {location} on {date}. The owner was negligent in restraining the animal. Requesting action.

unauthorized_protest.title: Unauthorized Protest or Rally
unauthorized_protest.template: An unauthorized rally/protest is taking place at {location} on {date}, causing severe traffic disruption and public inconvenience. Requesting dispersal.

fake_news_rumors.title: Spreading Fake News / Rumors
fake_news_rumors.template: I am reporting the spread of dangerous fake news regarding {topic} by {source} on {date}. This is likely to cause public mischief and panic. Requesting action.

fire_safety_violation.title: Violation of Fire Safety Norms
fire_safety_violation.template: The building at {address} is in gross violation of fire safety norms, lacking functional extinguishers and clear exits. Requesting an urgent inspection.

illegal_tree_cutting.title: Illegal Cutting of Trees
illegal_tree_cutting.template: Trees are being illegally cut down at {location} on {date} without permission from the Forest Department. Requesting an immediate stop and penalty.

water_wastage.title: Water Wastage / Illegal Boring
water_wastage.template: Illegal boring and massive wastage of water is occurring at {address}. This is violating environmental norms and ground water regulations. Requesting action.

transport_overcharging.title: Overcharging by Auto/Taxi Drivers
transport_overcharging.template: The driver of vehicle {reg_no} refused to go by meter and demanded ₹{amount} for the trip to {destination}. Requesting a penalty for overcharging.

fraudulent_weights.title: Fraudulent Weights in Market
fraudulent_weights.template: The vendor at {shop_name/location} is using fraudulent weights and measures for {product}. Requesting an inspection by the Weights and Measures department.

food_adulteration.title: Adulteration of Food or Milk
food_adulteration.template: I suspect that the {product} being sold at {location} is adulterated and unfit for consumption. Requesting a sample collection for laboratory testing.

expired_medicines.title: Sale of Expired Medicines
expired_medicines.template: The pharmacy at {location} sold me expired medicines on {date}. This is a serious threat to life. Requesting immediate cancellation of their license.

lockdown_violation.title: Violation of Lockdown / Curfew
lockdown_violation.template: A large gathering/business operation is violating the prevailing curfew/lockdown orders at {location} on {date}. Requesting police intervention.

banned_plastic.title: Use of Banned Plastic Items
banned_plastic.template: The use of banned single-use plastic is rampant at {location}. Requesting the authorities to conduct a surprise check and levy fines.

illegal_construction.title: Illegal Construction without Permit
illegal_construction.template: Construction is being carried out at {address} without the necessary building permits from the municipality. Requesting a stay on the work.

obstruction_public_servant.title: Obstruction of Public Servant
obstruction_public_servant.template: I was obstructed from performing my official duties by {name} at {location} on {date}. Requesting the registration of a case under Section 186 IPC.

false_info_police.title: Giving False Information to Police
false_info_police.template: I am reporting that {name} has provided false information and fabricated evidence to the police regarding {case_details}. Requesting action for misleading the law.

drunk_driving.title: Drunk Driving Complaint
drunk_driving.template: A driver of vehicle {reg_no} is driving in an intoxicated state at {location}. This is a major threat to public safety. Requesting immediate intercept.

tinted_glass_violation.title: Violation of Tinted Glass Rules
tinted_glass_violation.template: Vehicle {reg_no} has black tinted glass beyond the permissible limits. Requesting the traffic police to issue a challan and ensure removal.

high_beam_air_horn.title: Using High-Beam or Air Horns
high_beam_air_horn.template: Constant use of high-beam lights and illegal air horns by vehicles at {location} is causing extreme distress to residents and drivers. Requesting enforcement.

passport_verification.title: Police Verification for Passport
passport_verification.template: I am requesting the status of my passport police verification (File No: {file_no}). My application was submitted on {date}. Please expedite the process.

tenant_verification.title: Tenant Verification Request
tenant_verification.template: I am submitting the details for police verification of my new tenant, {tenant_name}, who is moving into {address} on {date}. Please provide the necessary clearance.

servant_verification.title: Domestic Help/Servant Verification
servant_verification.template: I wish to conduct a police verification for my domestic help {name} who joined on {date}. The ID documents are attached for your review.

character_certificate.title: Character Certificate for Job
character_certificate.template: I require a character/conduct certificate for employment purposes at {company_name}. I have been a resident of {address} for {years} years. Requesting issuance.

loss_educational_cert.title: Loss of School/College Certificates
loss_educational_cert.template: I am reporting the loss of my {degree/class} certificates which were lost on {date} at {location}. I need an official report to apply for duplicates.

loss_property_deed.title: Loss of Property Sale Deed
loss_property_deed.template: I am reporting the loss of my original Property Sale Deed (Document No: {doc_no}) which was lost on {date} at {location}. I require an official report for duplicates.

loss_bank_passbook.title: Loss of Bank Passbook/Cheque Book
loss_bank_passbook.template: I have lost my bank passbook and unused cheque book for account {acc_no} on {date}. Requesting a report to prevent misuse and get replacements.

arms_license_verification.title: Verification for Arms License
arms_license_verification.template: I have applied for an arms license (App No: {app_no}) and require the mandatory police verification. Requesting the local station to complete the inquiry.

loudspeaker_permission.title: Permission for Loudspeakers
loudspeaker_permission.template: I am requesting permission to use loudspeakers for {event_name} at {location} on {date} from {start_time} to {end_time}. We will adhere to decibel limits.

religious_procession.title: Permission for Religious Procession
religious_procession.template: Requesting permission for a religious procession of {route} on {date}. We expect a gathering of {number} people and will ensure no public disturbance.

wedding_function_late.title: Permission for Late-Night Wedding Function
wedding_function_late.template: Requesting permission for a wedding function at {location} on {date} extending until {time}. We will ensure sound limits are maintained after 10 PM.

missing_pet.title: Complaint Against Missing Pet
missing_pet.template: My pet {animal_type} (Name: {name}) has been missing from {location} since {date}. It was wearing a {color} collar. Requesting help in tracking/locating.

subsidy_non_receipt.title: Non-receipt of Government Subsidies
subsidy_non_receipt.template: I am reporting the non-receipt of my {subsidy_type} subsidy into my linked account {acc_no} since {month}. Requesting verification of the disbursement.

unidentified_dead_body.title: Reporting Unidentified Dead Body
unidentified_dead_body.template: An unidentified dead body of an adult/child was spotted at {location} on {date} at {time}. Requesting immediate recovery and forensic examination.

abandoned_vehicle.title: Reporting Abandoned Vehicle
abandoned_vehicle.template: A vehicle {reg_no} has been abandoned and stationary at {location} for over {days} days. It appears suspicious. Requesting a check for theft status.

official_rude_behavior.title: Complaint Against Behavior of Public Official
official_rude_behavior.template: I wish to file a formal complaint against the rude and uncooperative behavior of {official_name} at {department} on {date} during my visit for {purpose}.

temple_donation_theft.title: Theft of Temple/Mosque Donations
temple_donation_theft.template: Theft of donation boxes/cash occurred at {religious_place} on the night of {date}. The estimated loss is ₹{amount}. Requesting investigation.

cooperative_society_fraud.title: Fraud in Cooperative Society
cooperative_society_fraud.template: I am reporting financial irregularities and fraud by the management of {society_name} involving members' funds to the tune of ₹{amount}.

wildlife_trade.title: Illegal Trade of Wildlife Products
wildlife_trade.template: I wish to report the illegal sale of {animal_parts/product} at {location} on {date}. This is a violation of the Wildlife Protection Act.

coaching_copyright_violation.title: Copyright Violation in Coaching Center
coaching_copyright_violation.template: The coaching center {center_name} is illegally using and distributing my proprietary study material without authorization. Requesting a raid.

govt_symbol_misuse.title: Misuse of Government Symbols
govt_symbol_misuse.template: A private individual/vehicle {reg_no} is illegally using the Government of India/State logo and 'Government Vehicle' board at {location}.

illegal_mining.title: Illegal Mining (Sand/Stone)
illegal_mining.template: Illegal sand/stone mining is being carried out at {location} on the banks of {river} during the night hours. Requesting immediate seizure of equipment.

rti_misuse_harassment.title: Misuse of RTI (Harassment)
rti_misuse_harassment.template: I am reporting the targeted misuse of the RTI Act by {name} to harass me and my family by filing repetitive and frivolous applications. Requesting a review.

matrimonial_fraud.title: Fraudulent Marriage/Matrimonial Scam
matrimonial_fraud.template: I was defrauded of ₹{amount} by a person {name} I met on {site}. They fabricated a marriage proposal and fake emergency to take money. Requesting investigation.

silence_zone_violation.title: Violation of Silence Zone (Hospital/School)
silence_zone_violation.template: Loud music and honking are occurring routinely within the silence zone of {hospital_school_name}. Requesting strict enforcement and fines.

manhole_cover_theft.title: Theft of Manhole Covers
manhole_cover_theft.template: Theft of public manhole covers has occurred at {location}, creating a dangerous death trap for commuters. Requesting investigation and replacement.

unclaimed_suspicious_object.title: Reporting Unclaimed Suspicious Object
unclaimed_suspicious_object.template: An unclaimed bag/box has been found at {location} at {time}. It appears suspicious. Requesting a bomb disposal squad check.

loan_shark_complaint.title: Complaint Against Private Moneylenders
loan_shark_complaint.template: I am being harassed and threatened by private moneylenders {names} who are charging illegal interest rates and threatening physical harm. Requesting protection.

ragging_complaint.title: Ragging in College/Hostel
ragging_complaint.template: I am reporting an instance of severe ragging by senior students at {college_name} on {date}. I have been subjected to {details}. Requesting an anti-ragging inquiry.

religious_loudspeaker_misuse.title: Misuse of Loudspeakers by Religious Places
religious_loudspeaker_misuse.template: The religious place at {location} is using loudspeakers beyond the permitted hours and volume levels, causing a disturbance to the neighborhood. Requesting action.
